name_en: Code: 665719! Ultra Mini 🏆[MCM] Classic: Double row of rivets on the side. Made from our iconic Visetos coated canvas. Features luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑. Includes a tablet 💻 pocket. YKK zipper. Copper plate with unique serial code 🔢 not repeated,
